{{Quote|Listen up. Alfreda Goot wants to race, see? The first one to the Dockside Cantina in Mos Eisley wins.|Cabet Lom's droid|<ref name="SL" />}}
'''Alfreda Goot''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who became a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] after washing out of [[Fenn Shysa]] and [[Tobbi Dala]]'s covert elite [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] training program on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
[[File:Alfreda_Goot.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Alfreda Goot attacked Han Solo]]

During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] that followed the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], outlawed [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] [[Fenn Shysa]] and [[Tobbi Dala]] were covertly enlisted by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] people to train elite [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] forces for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. A trainee in the program, Alfreda Goot washed out to become a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], though not before [[Gender/Legends|she]] managed to acquire a set of [[Mandalorian Supercommando|supercommando]] armor.<ref name="HM" /> A ruthless killer, Goot worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] in the employ of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] of the Galactic Empire<ref name="SL" /> and minor crime lord [[Slag Flats]], though she was possessed of only mediocre skill as a mercenary.<ref name="HM" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Alfreda Goot attempted to establish a reputation by collecting on the lucrative bounty for [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] placed by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Reasoning that it would be easier than bringing Solo to the Hutt on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] by force, Goot concocted a scheme to use [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader and ally of Han's, to lure Solo to the [[Dockside Cafe]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] under the pretenses of a race. There, Goot arranged for eight aliens, including a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] named [[Karlo (Twi'lek)|Karlo]], to await her arrival and provide backup.<ref name="SL" />

On [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], where Solo and Organa were vacationing, Alfreda Goot disguised herself by clipping her whiskers and hiding her eyes with [[optical sun-shields]] to purchase a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and four [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] provisions from the Twi'lek outfitter [[Cabet Lom]]. She then boarded the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], Solo's modified [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], to kidnap Organa and taking the princess' [[Signet ring/Legends|signet]]. Returning to Lom, Goot had his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] deliver her challenge—a race to the Dockside Cafe, with Leia's signet as proof of the stakes—to Solo as he played [[fan-tan]] in Ord Mantell's [[Fifteen Moons Casino/Legends|Fifteen Moons Casino]]. With the ''Falcon'' in pursuit, Goot left for Tatooine.<ref name="SL" />

Initially convinced that Goot was in fact Leia herself, trying to demonstrate that her skill was equal to his own, Han Solo became entangled in an Imperial conflict over the [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|fighter]] cockpit and unconscious body of Darth Vader, which he had unknowingly taken aboard the ''Falcon'' as cargo. Threatening Vader's life with an explosive device, Solo coerced Imperial loyalist [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sodarra]] into aiding him in his mission, and arrived at the Dockside Cafe to confront Goot. Solo's legendary luck proved to be more than Goot's rudimentary skills could handle, and he was able to shoot her in the chest, [[Death/Legends|killing]] her and rescuing the Princess.<ref name="SL" />

==Personality and traits==
Alfreda Goot was a female [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] with a small frame and prominent cheekbones. After the Battle of Yavin, Goot had long, flame-[[Color/Legends|red]] hair<ref name="SL" /> in addition to her green fur, which she wore in small braids. Goot also wore ring-shaped piercings in her right ear.<ref name="HM" />

After washing out of the Mandalorian police program, Goot worked as a low-rent mercenary. She desired to make a name for herself, and saw Han Solo's bounty as an opportunity to do so. Despite her mediocre skills,<ref name="HM" /> Goot developed a reputation as a ruthless killer.<ref name="SL" />

==Equipment==
[[File:GootShot.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Alfreda Goot's armor could protect her from blaster fire.]]
Alfreda Goot wore a suit of cobbled-together Mandalorian supercommando armor.<ref name="HM" /> The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] armor was gray in color, made of [[Duralloy/Legends|duralloy]], and electronically enhanced the wearer's strength with a [[micropower plant]]. The armor's [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] was equipped with a [[Rangefinder/Legends|rangefinder]] and [[Electronic translator/Legends|translator device]], and its forearm armor contained four retractable [[somniject]]-poisoned blades in each gauntlet. In addition to these weapons, Goot carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|pistol]] and used a black [[Leather/Legends|leather]] strap to restrain prisoners. The Togorian also wore a [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]], in which she carried gas capsules of somniject antidote. In her race with Han Solo, Goot flew a space [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] with distinctive lines, resembling a [[pear]]-fruit with a wide base and narrow fore.<ref name="SL" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Well, the bounty hunter we ran into on Ord Mantell changed my mind.|Han Solo|<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>}}
Alfreda Goot first appeared in ''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]'', a [[1990]] [[West End Games]] solitaire adventure written by [[Troy Denning]] and illustrated by [[Francis Mao]].<ref name="SL" /> Goot's history was expanded upon in the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' article [[The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors|''The History of the Mandalorians'']] by [[Abel G. Peña]], including art depicting Goot by [[Joe Corroney]].<ref name="HM" />

''Scoundrel's Luck'' presents many branching paths with a variety of outcomes.<ref name="SL" /> As ''The History of the Mandalorians'' establishes that Goot lured Solo to the Dockside Cafe, but was ultimately unsuccessful in her hunt,<ref name="HM" /> this article assumes that the [[canon]]ical path is one in which Solo kills Goot and rescues Leia. In one potential path, Solo crashes on the planet [[Mon Torri]], cracking the ''Falcon''{{'s}} [[hyperdrive actuation diode]]. Goot provides Solo with a replacement, allowing him to proceed to Tatooine and spring her trap.<ref name="SL" />

There exists a discrepancy between Goot's appearance as described in ''Scoundrel's Luck'', with red hair and green eyes, and as pictured in ''The History of the Mandalorians'', with green fur and orange eyes.<ref name="HM" />

Alfreda Goot is one of several candidates for the "bounty hunter on Ord Mantell" mentioned by Han Solo in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="ESB" /> Others include [[Skorr/Legends|Skorr]], [[Cypher Bos]], and a [[fan-eared bounty hunter]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
